description: Refactor the 'MRISliceCache' class in the 'MedicalImagingSystem' project (~/eclipse-workspace/) to prevent OutOfMemory errors caused by the current HashMap implementation growing indefinitely. Modify 'src/main/java/com/medsys/imaging/MRISliceCache.java' to implement a Least Recently Used (LRU) eviction policy with a maximum capacity of 20 slices. Ensure the 'CacheStabilityTest' passes.
